8 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 31DEC2015 

Null/missing = not applicable (no associated accreditation organization 
(MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD_#) 

COMMENT: This data element is created from each submitted value reported in T-MSIS (up to a maximum of 5 
values). They are ordered using the MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD value (lowest value is considered 
MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD _1); the associated MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ACHVMT_DT and
